metadata.title: Agenflow — AI software that grows your business
metadata.description: We turn slow processes into an edge: we integrate automation and AI into your operation so you produce more with the same team.

services.title: Services
services.description: AI consulting, process automation, software by sector and online presence. We understand your operation and build the solution.

consultoria.title: AI consulting
consultoria.description: We analyze your operation and propose what to automate first, with a clear implementation plan. A working session, no commitment.

automatizacion.title: Process automation
automatizacion.description: We connect your tools and automate the manual work that slows the team down. Results in weeks, not months.

desarrollo.title: Software by sector
desarrollo.description: We design SaaS products specialized by vertical, with AI inside. Software that already knows your sector the day you open it.

presencia.title: Online presence
presencia.description: Web, SEO and AI visibility (GEO) so you get found on Google and ChatGPT. Three plans to bring your business up to date.

legal.title: Legal sector
legal.description: We automate the firm's processes —accounting audit, documentation and deadlines— to cut manual work and errors.

inmobiliario.title: Real estate & construction
inmobiliario.description: AI software for real estate agencies and property managers: lead capture, community management and document workflows without friction.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.description: Quotes based on the real scope of your project. Only online presence comes as fixed packages.

nosotros.title: About
nosotros.description: Agenflow was born from engineering on demanding projects: we bring automated systems and AI to Spanish SMBs so they become more profitable and resilient.

recursos.title: Resources
recursos.description: Guides, an automation savings calculator and a newsletter to help you produce more without growing costs with automation and AI.

blog.title: Blog
blog.description: Practical ideas on automation and artificial intelligence applied to SMBs. No jargon, no hype.

newsletter.title: Newsletter
newsletter.description: What we see working in automation and AI, every now and then and to the point. Actionable ideas and real cases, no spam.

calculadoraRoi.title: Automation ROI calculator
calculadoraRoi.description: Estimate in a minute the time and money you recover by automating repetitive tasks in your business.

trabajaConNosotros.title: Work with us
trabajaConNosotros.description: Join Agenflow. There are no open positions right now, but you can send us an open application.

contacto.title: Contact
contacto.description: Tell us what you want to improve in your operation and we'll suggest where to start. We'll get back to you shortly.

privacidad.title: Privacy policy
privacidad.description: How Agenflow handles your personal data under the GDPR and Spanish LOPDGDD: purpose, legal basis, processors and your rights.

avisoLegal.title: Legal notice
avisoLegal.description: Legal information about the owner of agenflow.es and the terms of use, under the Spanish LSSI-CE.

cookies.title: Cookie policy
cookies.description: Which cookies and technical storage agenflow.es uses. No analytics, advertising or tracking.

hero.title: We turn slow processes into capacity to grow.
hero.subtitle: We integrate automation and AI into your SMB's operation: the same team producing far more. Start with a consultation and we'll tell you exactly what to automate first.

services.title: First we listen. Then we build the best solution.

items.name: AI consulting
items.desc: We analyze your operation and you leave with a clear plan of what to automate first.

items.name: Process automation
items.desc: We connect your tools and remove the manual work that slows the team down.

items.name: Software by sector
items.desc: We build the software your sector needs and the market doesn't offer.

items.name: Online presence
items.desc: We revamp your website and visibility so you get found and sell more.

items.label: Sector 01
items.name: Real estate & construction
items.desc: Real estate agencies and property managers: lead capture, community management and document workflows without friction. We build fincai, our AI software for property management.

items.label: Sector 02
items.name: Legal
items.desc: Law firms: we automate accounting-audit processes to remove manual work and cut errors. Fewer hours on repetitive tasks, more time for clients.

security.title: Your data, protected and under control.
security.subtitle: You work with sensitive information. Protecting it and staying compliant isn't an extra —it's the foundation of how we work.

items.name: GDPR by design
items.desc: We comply with EU regulation from day one, not as an add-on.

items.name: Safeguarded processing
items.desc: We work with GDPR-compliant providers; any international transfer is covered by the safeguards the regulation requires.

items.name: Contract & confidentiality
items.desc: Data processing agreement (DPA) and confidentiality signed with every client.

items.name: Encryption & access control
items.desc: Encrypted data and least-privilege access: only those who should, access what they should.

whyUs.title: We know how. And we build it ourselves.

items.name: Real engineering background
items.desc: Years of engineering on demanding projects —construction and hospitals—. We design systems that hold up as the business grows.

items.name: Your results, guaranteed
items.desc: Your outcome comes before anything else. We work against measurable targets —time and margin recovered— and stand behind them.

items.name: You talk to who builds it
items.desc: No salespeople, no middlemen: the person who analyzes your operation is the one who designs and builds the solution.

finalCta.title: Your competition would rather you never found us.
finalCta.subtitle: Every week without automating is margin left on the table. Start with a consultation: we'll tell you what to automate first —even if you don't work with us.

items.q: Do you work with companies without a technical team?
items.a: Yes. We bring all the technical side and integrate with your team. You bring the business knowledge; we bring the solution.

items.q: How soon will I see results?
items.a: The consultation, in days. The first automations in production are measured in weeks, not months.

items.q: How do you protect our data?
items.a: GDPR compliance, EU-hosted data, a confidentiality agreement, and encryption with access control. It's detailed in the security section.

items.q: I'm not sure what to automate. Where do I start?
items.a: With the consultation: we analyze your operation and tell you exactly what to automate first and what impact to expect.

footer.tagline: We turn slow processes into capacity to grow.

items.q: How long is it and what do I get?
items.a: It depends on each case, but the session usually lasts 1 to 2 hours. Afterwards we analyze what we've seen and send you the plan —with opportunities prioritized by impact and the expected results— within 48 hours at most.

items.q: How do I prepare for the session?
items.a: Nothing special needed. Come with your day-to-day in mind; if you have a sense of how customers come in, what tools you use and where the team gets stuck, even better. We work out the rest together in the session.

items.q: Do I need a technical team?
items.a: No. We bring the whole technical side; you bring the knowledge of your business. We integrate with your team and your current tools.

items.q: Does it commit me to working with you?
items.a: No. The plan from the consultation is yours, and you can run it with us, with your team, or with whoever you want. No lock-in, no fine print.

consultoriaPage.title: Let's talk about your business.
consultoriaPage.subtitle: No jargon, straight to what matters. We analyze your operation in depth, find where technology saves you time and money, and you leave with a clear plan of where to start.

forWho.title: You sense your business could produce more with what it already has. But you don't know where to start.
items: Your team repeats the same manual work every week.
You've heard about AI, but you don't know how it fits your business.
You don't want a huge project: you want to know what moves the needle first.

uncover.title: What almost always shows up.
uncover.intro: Every business is different, but some opportunities repeat. These are the ones we uncover most often —and they're hard to spot from the inside.

items.name: Work done by hand
items.desc: Reports, lists and numbers someone assembles every week that could generate themselves.

items.name: Things that rely on memory
items.desc: Follow-ups, reminders and replies that slip when things get busy. Automating them removes the risk.

items.name: The same data, more than once
items.desc: Information typed or copied from one tool to another —double the time, double the errors.

process.title: A working session, not a sales call.
process.intro: We spend real time understanding your business and putting numbers to the opportunity. It's not a sales call: it's analysis. And you leave with something concrete in hand.

steps.name: We study your operation in depth
steps.desc: We sit down with you to understand how your business actually works: what your team does each day, where it gets stuck, and what steals your hours. Deep in the day-to-day, you stop seeing patterns; our job is to see them.
steps.takeaway: A clear picture of where your time and money slip away.

steps.name: We find the real opportunities
steps.desc: We cross what we've seen with what automation and AI can do today —in your case, not in theory. We tell you what's worth automating and what isn't. There are almost always two or three opportunities you didn't expect.
steps.takeaway: Concrete opportunities, prioritized by impact and effort.

steps.name: We hand you an actionable plan
steps.desc: No generic PDF: a plan with what to automate, in what order, how we'd do it and what impact to expect. It's yours. Run it with us, with your team, or with whoever you want.
steps.takeaway: A clear, prioritized plan, ready to execute.

expert.title: You're served by the person who will build your solution.
expert.body: No salespeople, no middlemen: you talk directly with the people who will design and build your solution. We know your sector's context and we speak your language, not a technical manual's.

finalCta.title: Let's focus on what makes you grow.
finalCta.subtitle: Tell us your case and we'll book your consultation. The plan it produces is yours —whether you run it with us or not.

items.q: How long until something is up and running?
items.a: The first automations in production are measured in weeks, not months. We start with what takes the most time and leave it working.

items.q: Do I have to change my tools?
items.a: No. We integrate with the ones you already use and automate the manual work around them, without breaking what works.

items.q: How is it quoted?
items.a: Based on the real scope. Once we understand the process we send a fixed quote, no commitment.

automatizacionPage.title: Every company has processes. The ones that grow keep them optimized.
automatizacionPage.subtitle: We connect your tools and automate the repetitive work that eats your team's hours, so those hours go to what actually grows the business.

problem.eyebrow: The cost of doing it by hand
problem.title: Each manual task looks small. Together, they hold your business back.
items: Copying data from one place to another, filling the same fields, moving files.
Reports someone assembles by hand every week —and that arrive late.
Potential customers who message you and get a reply late —or never.
Follow-ups that get forgotten and errors that slip in when things are rushed.

flow.title: We connect your tools and the work starts to flow on its own.
flow.intro: We don't change how you work: we connect what you already use. Information comes in, gets processed with automation and AI, and comes out ready where you need it —without anyone touching it along the way.

capabilities.title: If it's repetitive and follows rules, it can probably be automated.

items.name: Data across tools
items.desc: We sync information across your CRM, ERP, sheets and email. A single source of truth, always up to date.

items.name: Documents & forms
items.desc: We extract, classify and fill documents automatically. Invoices, contracts, files.

items.name: Reports & dashboards
items.desc: Your numbers, gathered on their own and laid out in clean, visual dashboards: what matters at a glance, ready the moment you open them.

items.name: Alerts & follow-up
items.desc: Reminders, alerts and follow-ups that fire at the right moment, for you and for your customers. Nothing falls through the cracks.

items.name: Replies & support
items.desc: Automatic answers to frequent questions over email, chat or WhatsApp, with the right tone and the right information.

items.name: Unique processes
items.desc: Is your workflow one of a kind? We map it and automate it end to end, integrating whatever it takes.

delivery.title: Results in weeks, not months.
delivery.intro: We start with what weighs the most and get it running fast. You see the impact before we keep expanding.

steps.name: We connect
steps.desc: We hook up your tools and data without touching how your team works. What you already use, integrated.

steps.name: We automate
steps.desc: We build the flow, test it with your real cases and refine it until it runs on its own, error-free.

steps.name: We ship to production
steps.desc: We leave it running in your day-to-day and look after it: we monitor, adjust and expand it with you.

reassurance.title: Without breaking what already works.
reassurance.body: We integrate with your current tools, we don't force them out —unless you ask us to. Your team keeps working the same way, just without the tedious part. And all with your data in the EU and under control.

finalCta.title: What task would you take off your plate tomorrow?
finalCta.subtitle: Tell us your process and we'll tell you what can be automated and what impact to expect. A fixed quote, no commitment.

items.q: Do you build software for any company?
items.a: We design products specialized by sector, with AI inside. If you know a sector inside out and see the software it's missing, we bring the technology: tell us about it and let's build it together.

items.q: How is it different from a generic tool?
items.a: The product is designed for one specific type of business, so it speaks its language from day one instead of forcing you to adapt.

items.q: What's the model and pricing?
items.a: Each product by sector has its own model and pricing on its page. To build something new together, let's talk about your case.

desarrolloPage.title: The software your sector needs, dedicated only to it.
desarrolloPage.subtitle: Your sector has needs that off-the-shelf software never covered. Today they can be solved —with a robust, reliable product built only for it.

thesis.title: The best software for your sector isn't adapted: it's designed for it.
thesis.body: Generic tools force your business to fit into them. We do the opposite: we study how a sector works and build the product it needs —with automation and AI integrated from day one.

pillars.name: Knows your business
pillars.desc: Designed around how your sector works, not a generic use case.

pillars.name: AI inside
pillars.desc: We build the power of AI into every product: it's what lets it help your business to the fullest, not an extra.

pillars.name: Grows with you
pillars.desc: An architecture built to grow —more volume, more cases— without adding fixed structural costs.

model.title: From sector knowledge to a product used every day.
model.intro: We don't start from an abstract idea. We start from a sector and from those who live it up close.

steps.name: We start from the sector
steps.desc: We get into how the business works —sometimes alongside a partner who lives it every day— until we understand what it's really missing.

steps.name: We design and build
steps.desc: We turn that knowledge into product: we design it, build it with AI inside and test it with real cases.

steps.name: We run it, and it grows
steps.desc: We put it live, maintain it and expand it. The product improves with every business that uses it.

showcase.title: Our own software, specialized by sector.
showcase.intro: Each product solves the real work of one type of business, with AI inside.

items.name: FincAI
items.desc: AI software so property managers can run their communities far better.

items.name: Replo
items.desc: End-to-end lead management: omnichannel inbox, WhatsApp agent, voice and visit scheduling.

items.name: Legal sector
items.desc: AI software for law firms: automates accounting-audit work, documentation and deadlines.

why.title: The software of the future, built today.
why.body: Every business will end up needing a digital infrastructure that sustains its operations and growth: automated, with artificial intelligence at its core. That future is already here —and those who move first will have the edge. The rest will be playing catch-up.

user.title: Are you in one of these sectors?
user.body: Discover the product for your business and join the list of the first to use it.

partner.title: Do you know a sector inside out?
partner.body: If you see the software your sector is missing and want to build it, we bring the technology. You the knowledge, us the product.

items.q: What is AI visibility (GEO)?
items.a: We work so ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI and Gemini know and recommend your business, just as SEO works your position on Google.

items.q: Do you guarantee AI will recommend me?
items.a: We don't promise guaranteed rankings or recommendations. We work your visibility with method; results depend on many factors.

items.q: Do you only build new websites?
items.a: We bring your website and digital presence up to date. Three plans, from essential to maximum visibility, plus an optional managed maintenance.

items.q: Can I add online booking or a calendar?
items.a: Yes. Online booking/calendar is an add-on you can attach to any plan, so your clients can book or schedule on their own, 24/7.

presenciaPage.title: Your lifelong business, visible on the internet of 2026.
presenciaPage.subtitle: In two years AI has changed everything, and most websites have fallen behind. We rebuild your presence so it loads fast, converts, and gets you found —on Google and in ChatGPT.

problem.title: Your website is stuck in the past, and it's costing you clients.
items: An old, slow website that doesn't build trust or invite contact.
SEO that's missing or outdated: you don't show up when people search.
And now people ask ChatGPT… and AI doesn't even know you exist.

shift.title: Having a website is no longer enough. You have to be visible —on Google and in AI.
shift.intro: We explain it clearly, no jargon, because it's exactly what almost no one is telling you.

cards.name: A website that converts
cards.desc: Fast, clear and built so visitors do what you want: book, call or message you.

cards.name: Up-to-date SEO
cards.desc: The work to get Google to show you when someone searches for what you offer. If you're not at the top, you don't exist.

cards.name: GEO: visibility in AI
cards.desc: More and more people ask ChatGPT, Perplexity or Google AI instead of searching. GEO makes AI know your business and recommend it.

audience.title: For local businesses like yours.
audience.intro: You don't need to be in a specific sector: if you want to be found —on Google and in AI—, this is for you.

items.name: Clinics & beauty centers
items.desc: Dental, physio, aesthetics or hair: get found and get booked.

items.name: Electricians & installers
items.desc: HVAC, plumbing or solar: show up when people search your service nearby.

items.name: Hospitality & local retail
items.desc: Bars, restaurants and shops: a fast site, an up-to-date Google profile and reviews that add up.

items.name: Firms & professional services
items.desc: Advisors, lawyers or consultancies: a presence that conveys the trust you sell.

items.name: Renovations & home services
items.desc: Construction, maintenance or cleaning: win quotes without relying on word of mouth.

items.name: Any SMB with local customers
items.desc: If your customers are nearby, we help them find you before the competition.

audit.title: Do you know what AI says about your business right now?
audit.body: Type your business name and city. We ask an AI with internet access and show you, right here, what it knows about you. The answer is almost always surprising —and that's where you see the work to be done.
audit.placeholder: Show me the best dental clinics in Málaga
audit.resultCta: I want AI to know me
audit.disclaimer: Answer generated by an AI with web search. It's indicative: it reflects what AI finds about your business today.

errors.notConfigured: The live check will be available very soon. In the meantime, write to us and we'll run it for you.
errors.rateLimited: You've run several checks in a row. Wait a moment and try again.
errors.failed: We couldn't complete the check. Please try again in a moment.

plans.title: Choose how you want to be found.
plans.subtitle: Three levels to bring your business up to date. No shelf prices: we send a closed quote based on your case.

items.name: Essential
items.info: Your website, done right and ready.

features.text: Custom website, fast and flawless on mobile and desktop (responsive + HTTPS)
Copy & CTA built to get you contacted (WhatsApp and call)
Basic Google Business profile, tuned up
Contact form delivered to your inbox

items.name: Professional
items.info: Get found in your area and chosen over the rest.

features.tooltip: Schema, metadata, Google Analytics 4 and Search Console set up.
Citations/NAP, local keywords and review management to rank in your area.

features.text: Advanced Google Business profile, optimized to win clients
Analytics: how many people visit and where they come from

items.name: Visibility 360
items.info: To own your market, in the AI era too.

features.text: Show up in AI answers (ChatGPT, Gemini…)
features.tooltip: Optimization so ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI and Gemini know and recommend your business, not just Google.

features.text: CRO: optimization to turn more visits into clients

compare.title: What each plan includes.

rows.feat: On-page SEO (schema, metas, GA4, Search Console)
Visibility in AI (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI, Gemini)

compare.note: Booking/online calendar comes as an optional add-on: add it to any plan, since not every business needs it.

addon.title: Managed maintenance: your website alive, secure and up to date.
addon.body: Launching is only the start. Managed maintenance keeps your website secure, backed up and running, and your SEO, GEO and AI visibility up to date —because search engines and AIs change every month. It includes support and the small day-to-day changes. It comes included with your plan by default; it's optional and you can cancel it whenever you want.
points: Hosting, SSL, domain and backups monitored
Local SEO, Google profile and AI visibility kept current
Support included and small changes every month
addon.note: Recurring service, included by default and optional. Tailored to your plan.

plansLink.title: Three plans to bring you up to date.
plansLink.body: Three levels —from essential to maximum visibility—, with an optional managed maintenance to keep everything up to date and running. See what each plan includes on the pricing page.

finalCta.title: Let's put your business where people —and AI— can find it.
finalCta.subtitle: Tell us where you stand today and we'll tell you where to start. No commitment.

servicesHub.title: We understand your operation and build the solution.
servicesHub.subtitle: First we understand your business. Then we build and deploy the solution that makes it grow.

items.q: Which firm processes do you automate?
items.a: We start where you lose the most time today —accounting audit, document review, deadlines, client reports— and, really, any repetitive process in the firm.

items.q: Is it safe with sensitive data?
items.a: Yes. We work with GDPR by design, data in the EU, a confidentiality agreement and encryption with access control. Confidentiality is the baseline.

items.q: Do I have to change my tools?
items.a: No. We automate on top of how you work today and integrate with your team.

legalPage.title: Less manual work. More time to practice law.
legalPage.subtitle: We know how a law firm works and we bring automation and AI to the documentary, repetitive load that eats the most time: less work by hand, fewer errors and more hours for your team.

problem.title: The documentary load grows. The team's hours don't.
items: Every case drags contracts, accounts and filings that someone reviews and reconciles by hand, one by one.
The same data is keyed in and copied from one tool to another — and that's where the error slips in.
Deadlines, due dates and deliverables that depend on no one, with everything on their plate, slipping up.

pains.title: Four bottlenecks you'll recognize instantly.
pains.intro: You know them well. Here's what we automate in each one.

items.pain: Reconciling accounts and reviewing documentation by hand, case after case.
items.fix: We automate the review: the system reconciles, cross-checks and flags whatever needs your judgment.

items.pain: A discrepancy or a typo slips in and surfaces late, when it's already time to redo it.
items.fix: The automation cross-checks the data and flags the discrepancy on the spot, not at the end.

items.pain: Deadlines and deliverables tracked from memory, and one ends up cutting it close.
items.fix: Automatic tracking of every deadline, with alerts before it turns into an emergency.

items.pain: Each case's information is scattered and finding it eats the whole morning.
items.fix: Documentation organized and queryable: you find the detail by asking in plain language.

automate.title: If it's repetitive, it can be automated.
body: We start where you lose the most time today and move on to the rest: accounting and bank reconciliation, document review, deadline tracking and client reports.
And it's not a closed list. If there's a repetitive task in your firm that eats up hours, we analyze it, map it and implement it. You tell us where it hurts; we automate it.
feed: Court date added to the calendar

delivery.title: From manual process to running, in three steps.
delivery.intro: No endless projects: we understand how you work, automate it and leave it running with your team.

steps.name: We map your operation
steps.desc: We sit down with your team and map the processes that generate the most time and errors.

steps.name: We automate the process
steps.desc: We build the automation on your tools and refine it with real cases.

steps.name: We leave it running
steps.desc: We put it to work with your team and stay to fine-tune it as you use it.

trust.title: Your firm's confidentiality is ours too.
trust.intro: You work under professional privilege. So do we: your firm's information and your clients' is protected at every step, not as an add-on.

items.name: GDPR by design
items.desc: Data-protection compliance built into every automation from day one.

items.name: Safeguarded processing
items.desc: We work with GDPR-compliant providers; where any data is processed outside the EU, it's under the safeguards the regulation requires.

items.name: Agreement & confidentiality
items.desc: Data-processing agreement (DPA) and confidentiality agreement over everything we touch.

items.name: Encryption & access control
items.desc: Encrypted information and controlled access: only those who should reach each piece of data.

finalCta.title: Run a law firm? Let's talk.
finalCta.subtitle: Tell us how you work today and we'll tell you which processes you can take off your plate —starting with the one that weighs on you most.

items.q: Do you work with agencies and property managers?
items.a: Yes. For property management we build fincai; for real estate agencies we automate lead capture and management end to end.

items.q: What if I'm a builder or renovator?
items.a: We automate coordination, documentation and site follow-up with consulting and automation.

items.q: Does it integrate with the channels I use?
items.a: We centralize the contacts coming in through different channels so no opportunity is lost and follow-up is automatic.

inmobiliarioPage.title: Our own technology for real estate agencies and property managers.
inmobiliarioPage.subtitle: The sector loses clients to slow replies and hours lost to paperwork. We build the AI software that fixes it, for real estate agencies and property managers.

problem.title: Too much time on tasks that could be automated.
items: Leads coming in through a dozen channels and going cold before anyone replies.
Visits, calls and WhatsApps impossible to track by hand.
Communities with documents, incidents and meetings that eat up hours.
Opportunities slipping away every day because no one gets to them in time.

pains.title: We know exactly where you lose time and clients.
pains.intro: We know the real bottlenecks of each business in the sector —and we build to clear them out of the way.

items.pain: A lead waits hours and goes to whichever agency replies first.
items.fix: A WhatsApp and voice agent that answers instantly, any time, and books the visit.

items.pain: Contacts from Idealista, Fotocasa, web and calls that slip through the cracks.
items.fix: Omnichannel inbox: every opportunity in one place, with follow-up, none lost.

items.pain: Visits, calls and reminders impossible to juggle by hand.
items.fix: Automatic scheduling and follow-up: the system remembers, confirms and nudges for you.

items.pain: Every community incident is an email, a call and a loose sheet of paper.
items.fix: AI logs, classifies and follows every incident until it's closed.

items.pain: Finding a document or prepping a meeting eats the whole morning.
items.fix: Each community's documents, organized and queryable in plain language.

items.pain: Answering residents the same thing a hundred times.
items.fix: Automatic answers to frequent questions, with the right info for their community.

products.title: Our software for the sector.
products.intro: Our own software for the sector: specialized, with AI inside.

inbox.title: Unified inbox

rows.preview: Is the downtown flat still available?
I'd like to book a viewing
Transcribed and answered on its own

inbox.footer: The agent replies and books viewings, 24/7

items.name: FincAI
items.desc: AI software so property managers can run their communities far better: an agent that orchestrates documents, incidents and communication.

items.name: Replo
items.desc: End-to-end lead management: omnichannel inbox, WhatsApp agent, voice and visit scheduling. So you reply first and sell more.

construction.title: The hard part isn't the build: it's everything around it.
construction.intro: Coordinating, documenting and following up eat the hours that should go into building. It's the next vertical we're preparing —and this is what we'll solve.

items.pain: Site reports and progress in WhatsApp and on paper.
items.fix: Capture and centralize the daily report: from the site to the dashboard, no manual collecting.

items.pain: Coordinating trades and subcontractors over endless calls.
items.fix: Automatic alerts, confirmations and follow-up so each trade shows up when it should.

items.pain: Measurements, certifications and cost overruns spotted too late.
items.fix: Cost and progress up to date: you see the deviation before it hurts.

items.pain: Quality and safety documentation scattered everywhere.
items.fix: All site documentation organized and one click away, ready for any audit.

construction.note: In the works. Tell us your case if you're interested and we'll keep you posted.

segments.title: If you see yourself here, we speak your language.

items.name: Neighborhood agency

packages.title: Online presence

aboutPage.title: We were born inside the problem we solve
aboutPage.subtitle: Years of engineering on demanding projects taught us one thing: a business is profitable when, on the inside, its systems are well defined and orchestrated. Agenflow brings those systems —now powered by AI— to Spanish SMBs.

origin.title: From building hospitals to Agenflow
paragraphs: I'm Francisco Javier Arias, an industrial engineer. I spent over 5 years in construction and international hospital projects: huge builds, with hundreds of people and thousands of details that all have to fit together. There you learn fast that a project succeeds —and turns a profit— when the systems inside are well defined and orchestrated.

I also lived the other side. Like all of my colleagues, I suffered the same problem: endless hours, no time for anything, and processes with enormous room for improvement. A lot of effort spent on tasks a good system could handle.

The idea of building something of my own was always there. When I saw what automation and artificial intelligence could do with those processes, I didn't think twice: I spent more than a year learning and applying it for real, until I founded Agenflow.
origin.name: Francisco J. Arias
origin.photoAlt: Francisco J. Arias, founder of Agenflow

mission.quote: My goal with Agenflow is for Spanish SMBs to become more profitable and more resilient. We bring artificial intelligence and automation into your day-to-day operation so you produce more without growing your costs, with processes that hold up as the business scales.
mission.author: Francisco J. Arias, Founder

focus.title: Sectors we know first-hand
focus.intro: From experience, Agenflow always looks to real estate and construction: we know where it hurts and how to fix it. And we give the legal sector special weight for two reasons: it's a field that gains a lot from these systems and, at the same time, it keeps us close to the regulatory and legal compliance that surrounds a business like ours.

items.title: Real estate & construction
items.desc: Lead capture, community management, paperwork and site work: we automate the processes that eat the most time in the sector.

items.title: Legal
items.desc: Accounting audits, documentation and deadlines for the firm, with confidentiality as the baseline for everything.

items.title: You talk to who builds it
items.desc: No middlemen. The person who analyzes your operation is the one who designs and builds the solution, from day one.

items.title: Results first
items.desc: AI and automation are the tool, not the headline. What we measure is time recovered and processes that stop failing.

items.title: Focus by sector
items.desc: We don't do everything for everyone. We specialize to understand the business before touching anything.

items.title: Confidentiality & security
items.desc: GDPR by design, data in the EU and confidentiality agreements. Your information is handled with the same care as our own.

items.q: Do you only work with real estate, construction and legal?
items.a: With our own software we go deepest in real estate, construction and legal. But automation, AI and online-presence improvement (web, SEO and AI visibility) work for any SMB or local business —clinics, beauty, electricians, installers, hospitality, retail…—. If you have repetitive tasks or want to be found better online, let's talk.

items.q: Do I need to know about technology to work with you?
items.a: No. You know your business; we translate it into systems. We explain every step in your language, no jargon.

items.q: Where do we start?
items.a: With a consultation: we analyze your operation and you walk away with a clear plan, whether you execute it with us or not.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: How we handle your personal data when you contact Agenflow or browse this site, under Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) and Spanish Organic Law 3/2018 (LOPDGDD).

sections.heading: Data controller
body: The controller of your data is Francisco Javier Arias Carrillo (Tax ID 45886331C), with address at c/ Huelva, 38, 14400 Pozoblanco (Córdoba), Spain, operating under the Agenflow brand.
You can contact us at any time at info@agenflow.es.

sections.heading: What data we process
body: We process the data you provide when you fill in the contact form: your name, your email and, optionally, your company name and the content of your message.
If you subscribe to our newsletter, we process your email address and the record of your consent to send it to you.
If you use the AI visibility check, we process the business name (and the city, if you include it) you type to run the query.
We do not collect special categories of data, we do not build profiles and we do not make automated decisions about you.

sections.heading: Purpose
body: We use the contact form data to respond to your enquiry and to get in touch with you regarding Agenflow's services.
If you subscribe to the newsletter, we use your email to send you our communications about automation and AI. We do not send marketing communications to anyone who has not subscribed.

sections.heading: Legal basis
body: The legal basis for processing is your consent, given when you submit the form, and our legitimate interest in responding to the requests you send us (Article 6.1.a and 6.1.f GDPR).
For the newsletter, the legal basis is your explicit consent (Article 6.1.a GDPR), which you can withdraw at any time by unsubscribing.

sections.heading: Retention
body: We keep your data for as long as needed to handle your request and, afterwards, for the periods required by law. Once it is no longer necessary, we delete it.
If you subscribe to the newsletter, we keep your email for as long as you remain subscribed; when you unsubscribe, we stop using it.

sections.heading: Recipients and processors
body: We do not share your data with third parties except where legally required. To run the site and some of its features we rely on providers acting as data processors: Vercel (site hosting), Resend (delivery of the contact email and management of the newsletter subscriber list) and Anthropic (which processes the business name you enter in the AI visibility check), with whom we maintain the agreements required by the GDPR.
Where any of these providers processes data outside the European Economic Area, it does so under the appropriate safeguards set out in the GDPR.

sections.heading: Your rights
body: You can exercise your rights of access, rectification, erasure, objection, restriction and portability by writing to info@agenflow.es, stating the right you wish to exercise.
If you believe we have not handled your request properly, you can lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (www.aepd.es).

sections.heading: Cookies
body: This site uses only the technical cookies and storage needed to work. You'll find the detail in our Cookie policy.

legalNotice.title: Legal notice
legalNotice.intro: Legal information about the owner of this website and the terms of use, under Spanish Law 34/2002 on Information Society Services and Electronic Commerce (LSSI-CE).

sections.heading: Site owner
body: In compliance with the information duty under Article 10 of the LSSI-CE, the following details are stated: the owner of this website is Francisco Javier Arias Carrillo (Tax ID 45886331C), with address at c/ Huelva, 38, 14400 Pozoblanco (Córdoba), Spain. "Agenflow" is the trading name under which he operates. Contact email: info@agenflow.es.

sections.heading: Purpose
body: This legal notice governs the use of the agenflow.es website, which provides information about Agenflow's consulting, automation and software development services.
Browsing the site grants the condition of user and implies acceptance of the terms set out in this legal notice.

sections.heading: Terms of use
body: The user agrees to make appropriate use of the site's content and not to use it for unlawful activities or activities contrary to good faith.
The owner may modify the information on the site, as well as its configuration and presentation, at any time and without prior notice.

sections.heading: Intellectual and industrial property
body: The site's content (texts, trademarks, logos, design and code) belongs to Francisco Javier Arias Carrillo or to third parties who have authorised its use, and is protected by intellectual and industrial property law.
Its reproduction, distribution or public communication without the owner's express authorisation is prohibited.

sections.heading: Liability
body: The owner is not liable for damages arising from the use of the site or from the presence of viruses or other elements that may alter the user's systems.
The site may contain links to third-party pages; the owner assumes no responsibility for their content.

sections.heading: Applicable law
body: This legal notice is governed by Spanish law. Any dispute will be submitted to the courts and tribunals that apply under the law.

cookies.title: Cookie policy
cookies.intro: Which cookies and local storage agenflow.es uses and how you can manage them.

sections.heading: What cookies are
body: A cookie is a small file that a website stores in your browser to remember information about your visit. Similar technologies, such as local storage (localStorage), serve comparable purposes.

sections.heading: Cookies we use
body: agenflow.es uses only technical cookies and storage, needed for the site to work and to remember your preferences. We do not use analytics, advertising or tracking cookies, so we do not need your prior consent to set them.
The detail is as follows:

rows: Remember the language you choose (Spanish or English).
Remember the light or dark theme you select.
Remember that you have already seen this cookie notice.

sections.heading: How to manage them
body: You can delete or block these cookies from your browser settings. As they are necessary technical cookies, blocking them may prevent the site from remembering your language or theme preference.
Every browser provides instructions to manage cookies in its help section (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge).

sections.heading: Changes to this policy
body: If we add further cookies in the future (for example, analytics), we will update this policy and, where necessary, ask for your consent before setting them.

cookieBanner.text: We only use the technical cookies needed for the site to work and to remember your language and theme. No analytics, no tracking.
